research.title: Fable 5 as Orchestrator: The Model-Routing Playbook for Claude Code
research.whyTrending: Community-converged architecture post-relaunch: Fable 5 plans/reviews, Sonnet 5 builds, Haiku 4.5 does chores. Nobody shows a complete working setup with subagent configs and real cost numbers.

seo.suggestedTitle: Fable 5 as Orchestrator: A Claude Code Model-Routing Playbook

strategy.angle: Pay for judgment, not keystrokes: complete working setup (main loop + subagent frontmatter + workflow model overrides) with a real cost breakdown nobody else publishes
strategy.title: Fable 5 as Orchestrator: A Claude Code Model-Routing Playbook
strategy.excerpt: Running Fable 5 as your daily driver burns money on work Haiku does fine. Here is the three-tier routing setup I use in Claude Code, with configs and real cost math.
